reasoning: Solid timing-based CBC padding oracle with proper flag isolation (build-time encryption, file deletion, privilege drop) and a clean Flask API structure. The XOR mask transformation layer (iv[0]) adds apparent complexity but is trivially neutralized since the attacker controls the IV — setting iv[0]=0 eliminates the mask for blocks 2+, and for block 1 the coupling is straightforward to account for. The 60ms timing delay is generous enough that statistical distinguishing requires minimal samples, reducing the oracle to near-standard difficulty despite the timing-only design. Defense depth is decent (CBC + mask + timing normalization + privilege drop) but the mask provides only superficial hardening.
